concerns.text: FR-004 and FR-011 allow alternative path of statistical control for common-method variance when 7-day gap cannot be met. T022 only implements hard abort, missing coverage for the statistical control alternative.

SC-001 requires ≥95% processing success on benchmark ≥100 sessions; SC-002 requires ±0.01 metric accuracy on ground-truth ≥50 users. T056/T057 acquire datasets but no task explicitly verifies these success criteria thresholds are achieved.

Constitution Principle II requires citation validation for all external sources. T065 invokes Reference-Validator but no task explicitly implements citation validation with location specification (FR-012 only covers checksum verification).
FR-003 specifies weights file path as `config/agency_weights.yaml` but T018 creates it at `configs/agency_weights.yaml` (with 's'). Path mismatch will cause runtime failures.

FR-009 requires validation output at `validation/report.pdf` but plan stores results at `data/validated_features/validation_report.yaml`. T039 creates PDF but plan path differs, violating Single Source of Truth.

Phase 9 Revision Concerns tasks (illusion-of-control, biological mechanism, truth vs manipulation) reference US1-US4 but have no corresponding FR/SC in spec. These are scope expansion without spec coverage.
Spec Assumptions state 'Ethical review and data-privacy compliance are handled externally'. T075/T078 add ethical review documentation and AI disclosure templates without spec authorization.
